entity: 2015-16 NBA Finals: Cleveland Cavaliers def. Golden State Warriors 4-3 (the 3-1 comeback)
notes: Indexed from the CLE side (1610612739). round_number is 1-indexed within a season (1=First Round, 2=Conf. Semis, 3=Conf. Finals, 4=Finals) per getTeamPlayoffSeries' ROW_NUMBER() ORDER BY series_start. All numeric columns come back as JSON strings (BIGINT) — the expected values mirror that.
